notes: F009 spec is locked. Sprint 1 carry-over (D062). Three security controls: per-install-token rate limit on /api/* non-localhost (60 req/min default), install-token session expiry (7 days default), token rotation via POST /api/auth/rotate. Handoff to UX Researcher to frame the security-conscious operator's journey and confirm the API-only surface for Sprint 2 (the UI section lives in Sprint 3).
review_criteria: Confirm target segment = security-conscious operator (not a first-time onboarder)
Confirm API-only delivery is right for Sprint 2 (no /settings/security page in this sprint)
Confirm the 429 + Retry-After response shape is scriptable
Flag any adjacent need this feature deliberately does not address
